title: QuadriFlow remesh feature-preserving (mech parts, hard-surface AI)
when_to_use: Mesh con spigoli netti da preservare (mech parts, scatole, chiavi, snap-fit) dove Voxel Remesh ammorbidisce troppo e Decimate non risolve i non-manifold. QuadriFlow è built-in Blender (bpy.ops.object.quadriflow_remesh) quindi zero install. Triggered da R012.
preconditions: preferibilmente watertight (su mesh aperta usa use_preserve_boundary)

target_faces.description: Numero target di facce post-remesh. QuadriFlow produce quad-dominant, quindi triangoli finali ~1.2-2x questo valore.

preserve_sharp.description: Preserva edge con dihedral > 30 gradi. true per mech parts, false per mesh organiche.

preserve_boundary.description: Preserva i bordi su mesh aperta. true se non sicuro.

steps.label: Make target active and deselect others
steps.code:
import bpy
for o in bpy.context.selected_objects:
    o.select_set(False)
obj = bpy.data.objects['{object_name}']
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
print(f'QuadriFlow target: {{obj.name}} ({{len(obj.data.polygons)}} faces)')

steps.label: Run QuadriFlow
steps.code:
import bpy
bpy.ops.object.quadriflow_remesh(
    mode='FACES',
    target_faces={target_faces},
    use_preserve_sharp={preserve_sharp},
    use_preserve_boundary={preserve_boundary},
    smooth_normals=False,
    seed=0,
)
obj = bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active
print(f'QuadriFlow done. Now {{len(obj.data.polygons)}} faces (quad-dominant).')

steps.label: Triangulate for STL export
steps.code:
import bpy
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.mesh.quads_convert_to_tris(quad_method='BEAUTY', ngon_method='BEAUTY')
bpy.ops.mesh.normals_make_consistent(inside=False)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
obj = bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active
print(f'Triangulated. Now {{len(obj.data.polygons)}} tri faces.')

verification.notes: QuadriFlow on a watertight input produces a watertight quad-dominant mesh. After triangulation the face count is roughly 1.5-2.5x target_faces. If watertight regressed, the source had boundary loops that QuadriFlow couldn't close — chain repair_basic after this playbook.
